text:
Let's dive into the technical aspects, Jamadagni! As we begin the mock interview, I'll play the role of a Senior Technical Interviewer at Meta. Don't worry if you feel a bit nervous - it's all part of the learning process.

Since you have knowledge in front-end technologies, let's explore that further. Can you explain the concept of a "closure" in JavaScript and provide an example of how it's used in a real-world scenario?
